goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'stevenage' and should leave on 'friday'.
The train should 'leave after 17:00' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'arrival time'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'entertainment'.
Make sure you get 'address', 'entrance fee', and 'area'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from stevenage and should leave on friday
The train should leave after 17:00 and should go to cambridge
Make sure you get arrival time
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of entertainment
Make sure you get address, entrance fee, and area
